decisions.title: Prioritize Alert Infrastructure vs Feature Work
decisions.context: 11 alert/monitoring tickets in queue (ENG-8974, 8971, 8983, 8982, 8981, 8980, 8533, 8881). Building the moat requires reliability, but customer-facing features drive north star metric.

arguments.for: Alert infrastructure prevents production incidents, unblocks enterprise customers, supports 'Build the Moat' pillar by ensuring platform reliability
arguments.against: Delays Explore V2 and Canvas features that directly capture decisions per customer, risk missing Q1 customer commitments

decisions.title: Scope Python Rules Execution Environment
decisions.context: ENG-7808 local k8s for python execution. Critical for Python Rules product launch. Affects security posture and 'Embed Deeper' strategy.

arguments.for: Enables Python Rules GA, unlocks data science teams, differentiates from competitors, core to 2026 roadmap
arguments.against: Significant infrastructure investment, ongoing security/maintenance burden, could delay other initiatives

decisions.title: Query Engine Performance: Quick Wins vs Architectural Refactor
decisions.context: Multiple performance issues: ENG-9022 DB query metrics, ENG-8960 channel list CPU, ENG-9021 excessive channel calls, ENG-8905 sampling methods, ENG-8990 window functions removal. Impacts Explore V2 user experience.
decisions.blockedBy: Need profiling data from ENG-9022 to determine if quick fixes sufficient or architectural changes required

arguments.for: Quick wins ship faster, reduce P99 latency immediately, unblock customers experiencing slow queries
arguments.against: May create technical debt, architectural refactor could solve root cause, window functions removal (ENG-8990) suggests deeper issues

decisions.title: Canvas Launch Readiness: Address Blocking Bugs Now or Post-Launch
decisions.context: Canvas has 4 critical bugs: ENG-9026 (rule+family stat), ENG-8777 (family config defaults), ENG-9014 (channel input), ENG-8952 (config polish). Impacts 'Nail the Core' pillar.

arguments.for: Fixing pre-launch ensures quality bar, prevents customer churn, maintains brand reputation for new flagship product
arguments.against: Delays launch by 2-3 weeks, may miss market window, competitors shipping similar features, can patch post-launch

decisions.title: Data Export Feature Scope for FD-40
decisions.context: FD-40 high-level interface for data export. Unclear if this supports existing products or new capability. Could impact multiple pillars depending on scope.

arguments.for: Data export critical for enterprise buyers, enables integration workflows, supports 'Embed Deeper' through API ecosystem
arguments.against: Scope creep risk, may duplicate existing functionality, engineering capacity constrained by other priorities

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy coordination load: 30 engineering tickets spanning 4 product areas require prioritization. Alert infrastructure consuming 35% of platform team capacity. Cross-functional dependencies slowing Canvas launch.
alerts: Only 8 free hours this week - insufficient for strategic decisions requiring deep analysis
11 alert/monitoring tickets suggest reactive rather than proactive mode on reliability
No dedicated time blocked for Q1 OKR review (30 days until quarter end)
Canvas bugs (ENG-9026, 8777, 9014) need consolidated triage session vs serial ticket review
